blocks.text: WHAT  A  HEAVENLY DEMON  SAYS  AND  DOES IS  THE  LAW !
blocks.translation: LES PAROLES ET ACTES D’UN DÉMON CÉLESTE SONT LA LOI !

blocks.text: WHETHER IT'S  IMPORTANT OR  UNIMPORTANT , FULFILLING  A  PROMISE OR  NOT .  THE  HEAVENLY DEMON  DECIDES ALL  OF  IT !
blocks.translation: QU’ELLE SOIT IMPORTANTE OU NON, SURVEILLER UNE PROMESSE OU NON. LE DÉMON CÉLESTE DÉCIDE DE TOUT !

blocks.text: YOU TRULY  ARE  BEYOND REPROACH .
blocks.translation: TU ES VRAIMENT IRRÉPROCHABLE.

blocks.text: NINIA
blocks.translation: NINIA

blocks.text: MY  BROTHER  CAN  BE DIFFICULT  BECAUSE  OF HIS  SELFISHNESS .
blocks.translation: MON FRÈRE PEUT ÊTRE DIFFICILE PAR SA ÉGOÏSME.

blocks.text: YOU  SHOULD COUNSEL  AND LOOK  AFTER HIM  WELL .
blocks.translation: TU DEVAIS LE CONSEILLER ET PRENDRE SOIN DE LUI.

blocks.text: YOU  REALLY ARE  SO  FAKE .
blocks.translation: TU ES TELLEMENT FAUX.

blocks.text: DID YOU  THINK  I'D  BE MOVED  BY  WORDS LIKE  THAT ?
blocks.translation: TU PENSAIS QUE J’ALLAIS ÊTRE ÉMU PAR DE TELLES PAROLES ?

blocks.text: THAT'S  NOT  IT . I  WAS  SPEAKING  ILL OF  MY  BROTHER  BEHIND HIS  BACK  BY  CALLING HIM  A  SELFISH PERSON .
blocks.translation: CE N’EST PAS ÇA. JE PARLAIS MAL DE MON FRÈRE DERRIÈRE SON DOS EN LE TRAITANT D’ÉGOÏSTE.

blocks.text: I  KNOW  YOUR RESOLVE  REGARDING MY  BROTHER  IS UNWAVERING .
blocks.translation: JE CONNAIS TA DÉTERMINATION FACE À MON FRÈRE.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: WHAT WOULD  YOU KNOW ?
blocks.translation: QUE SAIS-TU ?

blocks.text: YOU  SHOWED  ME THE  DAY  HE  RETURNED , DIDN'T  YOU ?
blocks.translation: TU M’AS MONTRÉ LE JOUR DE SON RETOUR, N’EST-CE PAS ?

blocks.text: I  FELT  YOUR AFFECTION  FOR  HIM DEEPLY  AT  THAT MOMENT .
blocks.translation: J’AI RESSENTI TON AFFECTION POUR LUI PROFONDÉMENT À CE MOMENT-LÀ.

blocks.text: DON'T PRESUME  TO KNOW  ME .
blocks.translation: NE FAIS PAS SEMBLANT DE ME CONNAÎTRE.

blocks.text: ABSOLUTE REGRESSION
blocks.translation: RÉGRESSION ABSOLUE

blocks.text: JP
blocks.translation: JP

blocks.text: SCRIPT ART  PARK  JIN  HWAN ORIGINAL  JANG  YUNGHOON
blocks.translation: SCÉNARIO ART PARK JIN HWAN ORIGINAL JANG YUNGHOON

blocks.text: WHY  DID YOU  WANT  TO SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: POURQUOI VOULAIS-TU ME VOIR ?

blocks.text: THERE  ARE  MANY REASONS ,  BUT  YOU  WOULDN'T BELIEVE
blocks.translation: IL Y A PLUSIEURS RAISONS, MAIS TU NE ME CROIRAS PAS.

blocks.text: THEM  ANYWAY .  IF  I  HAD TO  GIVE  YOU  A  REASON  WORTH BELIEVING ,  IT'S  MY  WAY  OF KEEPING  MY  OPPONENT IN  CHECK .
blocks.translation: SI JE DEVAIENT TE DONNER UNE RAISON À CROIRE, C’EST MA FAÇON DE TENIR MON ADVERSAIRE EN ÉCHEC.

blocks.text: KEEPING  THEM IN  CHECK ?
blocks.translation: LES TENIR EN ÉCHEC ?

blocks.text: YES , MY  BROTHER  HAS STARTED  MEETING PEOPLE .
blocks.translation: OUI, MON FRÈRE A COMMENCÉ À RENCONTRER DES GENS.

blocks.text: I'M  TRYING TO  SHOW  HIM  THAT I  CAN  ALSO  MEET WITH  PEOPLE .
blocks.translation: J’ESSAIE DE LUI MONTRER QUE MOI AUSSI, JE PEUX RENCONTRER DES GENS.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST OF  THOSE  PEOPLE IS  YOU .
blocks.translation: LA PREMIÈRE DE CES PERSONNES, C’EST TOI.

blocks.text: WILL  ANYTHING CHANGE  JUST  FROM MEETING  PEOPLE ?
blocks.translation: QUOI, ÇA CHANGERA QUOI DE RENCONTRER DES GENS ?

blocks.text: YOUR  BROTHER  IS A  PERCEPTIVE  MAN .
blocks.translation: TON FRÈRE EST UN HOMME PERSPICACE.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: HE  LACKS HUMAN  WARMTH , THOUGH .
blocks.translation: IL MANQUE CEPENDANT DE CHALEUR HUMAINE.

blocks.text: THAT'S  FINE . A  MAN  DESTINED  FOR GREATNESS
blocks.translation: PEU IMPORTE. UN HOMME DESTINÉ À LA GRANDEUR

blocks.text: SHOULDN'T BE  SWAYED  BY  PETTY PERSONAL  FEELINGS .
blocks.translation: NE DOIT PAS SE LAISSER AFFECTER PAR DES SENTIMENTS PERSONNELS MESQUINS.

blocks.text: HE  MAY  EVEN DISRESPECT  YOU AT  TIMES .
blocks.translation: IL PEUT MÊME TE MÉPRISER PARFOIS.

blocks.text: THAT'S  FINE . WHAT  DOES  IT  MATTER  IF HE  DISRESPECTS  ME ?  HE'S DESTINED  TO  BECOME A  HEAVENLY  DEMON .
blocks.translation: PEU IMPORTE. QU’IL ME MÉPRISE OU NON, IL EST DESTINÉ À DEVENIR UN DÉMON CÉLESTE.

blocks.text: לה ?
blocks.translation: לה ?

blocks.text: HE  WILL BREAK  IMPORTANT PROMISES  TOO .
blocks.translation: IL BRISERA AUSSI DES PROMESSES IMPORTANTES.

blocks.text: I'M  A  DIFFERENT PERSON  FROM  SWORD DEMON  OR  THE  SKY  HEAVEN CULT  LEADER .
blocks.translation: JE SUIS UNE PERSONNE DIFFÉRENTE DU DÉMON ÉPÉE OU DU CHEF DE LA CULTURE DU CIEL.

blocks.text: I  KNOW  THAT . AS  I  MENTIONED  BEFORE , I  NEVER  INTENDED  TO  MAKE YOU  ONE  MY  PEOPLE  IN THE  FIRST  PLACE .
blocks.translation: JE SAIS ÇA. COMME JE L’AI DÉJÀ DIT, JE N’AVAIS JAMAIS L’INTENTION DE TE FAIRE DE MES GENS AU DÉPART.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: ... SO  WHY ARE  YOU  DOING THIS ?
blocks.translation: ... ALORS POURQUOI FAIS-TU CELA ?

blocks.text: WHEN  I  SEE  YOU , I  THINK  OF  YOU  AS A  LITTLE  GIANT .
blocks.translation: QUAND JE TE VOIS, JE PENSE À TOI COMME UN PETIT GÉANT.

blocks.text: YOU  ARE GREATER  THAN
blocks.translation: TU ES PLUS GRAND QUE

blocks.text: I  DRINK  THIS WINE  WITH  RESPECT FOR  YOU .
blocks.translation: JE BOIS CE VIN EN TON HONNEUR.

blocks.text: I'LL  ADMIT THAT  YOU'RE  SKILLED  IN HANDLING  PEOPLE ,
blocks.translation: JE DOIS ADMETTRE QUE TU ES HABILE À MANIPULER LES GENS,

blocks.text: BUT  YOU WON'T  BE  ABLE TO  SWAY  ME .
blocks.translation: MAIS TU NE POURRAS PAS ME CHANGER.

blocks.text: YOU  CAN'T  BECOME THE  SUCCESSOR  WITH A  SMALL  EXPLOSION .
blocks.translation: TU NE DEVIENDRAS PAS SUCCESSEUR AVEC UNE PETITE EXPLOSION.

blocks.text: I'LL  INCITE HIM  TO  BLOW EVERYTHING AWAY .
blocks.translation: JE LE pousserai À TOUT FAIRE SAUTER.

blocks.text: IF  YOU  BELIEVE THE  SUCCESSION CAN  BE  DECIDED PEACEFULLY ,
blocks.translation: SI TU PENSES QUE LA SUCCESSION PEUT SE RÉGLER PACIFIQUEMENT,

blocks.text: THEN  YOU'RE
blocks.translation: ALORS TU ES

blocks.text: I  WANTED TO  KNOW  WHAT  KIND OF  PERSON  YOU  ARE .  I  WAS CURIOUS  ABOUT  WHO  STANDS BESIDE  MY  BROTHER  AND PROTECTS  HIM ,
blocks.translation: JE VOULAIS SAVOIR QUI TU ÉTAIS. JE ME DEMANDAIS QUI ÉTAIT À CÔTÉ DE MON FRÈRE ET QUI LE PROTÉGEAIT,

blocks.text: AND  I'VE  COME  TO A  CONCLUSION .
blocks.translation: ET J’EN SUIS ARRIVÉE À UNE CONCLUSION.

blocks.text: MY  BROTHER WOULD  BE  THE GREATEST  FOOL IN  THE  CULT
blocks.translation: MON FRÈRE SERAIT LE PLUS GRAND IMBÉCILE DE LA CULTURE

blocks.text: IF  HE  WERE  TO EVER  HURT  YOUR FEELINGS .
blocks.translation: S’IL BLESSAIT UN JOUR TES SENTIMENTS.

blocks.text: ANYONE  ELSE .
blocks.translation: QUICONQUE D’AUTRE.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: A  LITTLE GIANT ...
blocks.translation: UN PETIT GÉANT...

blocks.text: I  ONCE THOUGHT  OF  MYSELF THAT
blocks.translation: JE ME CONSIDÉRAIS AINSI UNE FOIS,

blocks.text: WAY ,
blocks.translation: MAIS PERSONNE NE M’A JAMAIS APPELÉ COMME ÇA.

blocks.text: BUT  NO  ONE HAS  EVER  CALLED ME  THAT
DOES  HE KNOW  WHAT  I'M THINKING ... ? !
blocks.translation: SAIT-IL CE QUE JE PENSE... ?!

blocks.text: PLEASE  TAKE GOOD  CARE  OF MY  BROTHER .
blocks.translation: PRENDS BIEN SOIN DE MON FRÈRE.

blocks.text: YOU'RE REALLY  ASKING ME  TO  LOOK  AFTER THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER ?
blocks.translation: TU ME DEMANDES VRAIMENT DE SURVEILLER LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE ?

blocks.text: I  INTEND  TO END  THE  SENSELESS KILLING  IN  THE  SUCCESSION STRUGGLE  DURING MY  GENERATION .
blocks.translation: J’AI L’INTENTION DE METTRE FIN AUX MEURTRES INSENSÉS LORS DE LA LUTTE POUR LA SUCCESSION PENDANT MA GÉNÉRATION.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: WHAT ?
blocks.translation: QUOI ?

blocks.text: FOR  THAT TO  HAPPEN ,  WE  CAN'T APPROACH  EACH  OTHER EMOTIONALLY .
blocks.translation: POUR QUE CELA ARRIVE, NOUS NE POUVONS PAS NOUS APPROCHER L’ÉMOTION DE L’AUTRE.

blocks.text: BUT  MY BROTHER  HAS  A  STRONG SENSE  OF  PRIDE ,  SO  IT  WILL BE  DIFFICULT  FOR  HIM TO  CONTROL  IT .
blocks.translation: MAIS MON FRÈRE A BEAUCOUP DE FIERTÉ, IL LUI SERA DIFFICILE DE LA MAÎTRISER.

blocks.text: PLEASE  STAY AT  HIS  SIDE  AND HELP  HIM .
blocks.translation: RESTE PRÈS DE LUI ET AIDE-LE.

blocks.text: EITHER  A  FOOL OR  A  LUNATIC .
blocks.translation: SOIT UN IMBÉCILE, SOIT UN FOU.

blocks.text: EVERYONE  WHO KNOWS  ME  SAYS I'M  CRAZY ,
blocks.translation: TOUS CEUX QUI ME CONNAISSENT DISENT QUE JE SUIS FOU,

blocks.text: SO  I  SUPPOSE I  MUST  BE .
blocks.translation: ALORS JE DOIS L’ÊTRE.

blocks.text: I  HATE LUNATICS .
blocks.translation: JE DÉTESTE LES FOUS.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: IF  YOU'RE THERE ...  EVEN  IF  MY BROTHER  RAMPAGES , YOU  MIGHT  BE  ABLE TO  STOP  HIM .
blocks.translation: SI TU ES LÀ... MÊME SI MON FRÈRE FAIT DES DÉGÂTS, TU POURRAIS PEUT-ÊTRE L’ARRÊTER.

blocks.text: YOU  UNDERSTAND NOTHING  ABOUT  ME .
blocks.translation: TU NE COMPRENDS RIEN À MOI.

blocks.text: IF  THE FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  RAMPAGES , THEN  I'LL  POUR  OIL ON  THAT  FIRE .
blocks.translation: SI LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE DÉRAPE, JE JETTERAI DE L’HUILE SUR LE FEU.

blocks.text: I  SEE .
blocks.translation: JE VOIS.

blocks.text: WHY  DON'T YOU  ASK  WHY  HE CAME  AND  WHAT  WE DISCUSSED ?
blocks.translation: POURQUOI NE PAS DEMANDER POURQUOI IL EST VENU ET CE QUE NOUS AVONS DISCUTÉ ?

blocks.text: BECAUSE  I TRUST  YOU .
blocks.translation: PARCE QUE J’AI CONFIANCE EN TOI.

blocks.text: YES , THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  IS  THIS  KIND OF  PERSON .
blocks.translation: OUI, LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE EST CE GENRE DE PERSONNE.

blocks.text: HE'S  NOT  DELICATE NOR  ELOQUENT ,  BUT GENUINE  AS  GOLD .
blocks.translation: IL N’EST NI DÉLICAT NI ÉLOQUENT, MAIS AUTHENTIQUE COMME L’OR.

blocks.text: IT  WAS
blocks.translation: C’ÉTAIT

blocks.text: DOD
blocks.translation: DOD

blocks.text: AFTER
blocks.translation: APRÈS

blocks.text: SEEING THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER ,
blocks.translation: AVOIR VU LE DEUXIÈME JEUNE MAÎTRE,

blocks.text: I  SUDDENLY  WANTED TO  SEE  THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  AGAIN .
blocks.translation: J’AI SUREMENT ENVIE DE REVOIR LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE.

blocks.text: I  THINK  I  NEED TO  SEE  HIM  MORE BEFORE  I  CAN SLEEP .
blocks.translation: JE PENSE QUE J’AI BESOIN DE LE VOIR PLUS AVANT DE POUVOIR DORMIR.

blocks.text: RIGHT  TO  COME FIND  HIM .
blocks.translation: LE DROIT DE VENIR LE TROUVER.

blocks.text: I  SHALL TRUST  IN  HIM .
blocks.translation: JE VAIS LUI FAIRE CONFIANCE.

blocks.text: PLEASE HAVE  A  GOOD REST .
blocks.translation: REPOSE-TOI BIEN.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: OFFERING  THE SUPREME  DEMON  POSITION TO  THE  BLOOD  HEAVENS  SWORD DEMON  WAS  FOR  THE  PURPOSE OF  WINNING  HIM  OVER .
blocks.translation: OFFRIR LA POSITION DE DÉMON SUPRÊME AU DÉMON ÉPÉE DU CIEL DE SANG ÉTAIT POUR LE GAGNER.

blocks.text: YOU'RE BACK ?
blocks.translation: TU ES DE RETOUR ?

blocks.text: HE  DOESN'T EVEN  ASK  WHY  I'VE COME  AGAIN  WHEN WE  JUST  MET .
blocks.translation: IL NE DEMANDE MÊME PAS POURQUOI JE SUIS REVENUE ALORS QUE NOUS NOUS SOMMES JUSTE VUS.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: THAT'S
blocks.translation: C’EST

blocks.text: RIGHT .
blocks.translation: JUSTE.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST YOUNG  MASTER  HAS NEVER  BEEN  ONE  TO  REVEAL EMOTION  EASILY .
blocks.translation: LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE N’A JAMAIS ÉTÉ DE CEUX QUI EXPRIMENT FACILEMENT LEURS ÉMOTIONS.

blocks.text: PERSONAL  CURIOSITY  OR
blocks.translation: LA CURIOSITÉ PERSONNELLE OU

blocks.text: HE'S NOT  A  FLAME  THAT WAVERS  AT  SUCH THINGS .
blocks.translation: IL N’EST PAS UNE FLAMME QUI TREMULE POUR SI PEU.

blocks.text: THE  SECOND YOUNG  MASTER  CAME TO  VISIT  ME .
blocks.translation: LE DEUXIÈME JEUNE MAÎTRE EST VENUE ME RENDRE VISITE.

blocks.text: MUGEUK ?
blocks.translation: MUGEUK ?

blocks.text: YES .
blocks.translation: OUI.

blocks.text: WHY  IS HE  EXPLAINING NOW ... ?
blocks.translation: POURQUOI EXPLIQUE-T-IL MAINTENANT... ?

blocks.text: HE  WOULDN'T  DO IT  WHEN  I  BEGGED FOR  IT ,
blocks.translation: IL NE LE FAISAIT PAS QUAND JE LE SUPPLIAIS,

blocks.text: SO  WHY DO  SO  AFTER  GEOM MUGEUK
blocks.translation: ALORS POURQUOI LE FAIT-IL APRÈS QUE GEOM MUGEUK SOIT VENU ME VOIR ?

blocks.text: HAS  COME TO  SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: QUAND JE DEVIENDRAI LE DÉMON CÉLESTE, LA POSITION DE DÉMON SUPRÊME TE REVIENDRA NATURELLEMENT.

blocks.text: WHEN  I BECOME  THE  HEAVENLY DEMON ,  THE  SUPREME DEMON  POSITION  WILL NATURALLY  BE YOURS .
YES , NOW  YOU  KNOW  HOW MUCH  GEOM  MUGEUK HAS  CHANGED .
blocks.translation: OUI, MAINTENANT TU SAIS À QUEL POINT GEOM MUGEUK A CHANGÉ.

blocks.text: YOUR YOUNGER  BROTHER IS  AN  OPPONENT  WHO DEMANDS
blocks.translation: TON JEUNE FRÈRE EST UN ADVERSAIRE QUI EXIGE

blocks.text: SUCH VIGILANCE
blocks.translation: UNE TELLE VIGILANCE

blocks.text: BUT  THERE'S  NO NEED  TO  LOSE  FAITH IN  YOURSELF ...
blocks.translation: MAIS IL NE FAUT PAS PERDRE FOI EN TOI...

blocks.text: HE'S  STILL YOUNG ,  THAT'S ALL .
blocks.translation: IL EST TOUJOURS JEUNE, C’EST TOUT.

blocks.text: ARE  YOU ANXIOUS  BECAUSE GEOM  MUGEUK  MIGHT SWAY  ME
blocks.translation: ES-TU INQUIET QUE GEOM MUGEUK ME FASSE CHANGER

blocks.text: EVEN  THOUGH YOU  ORIGINALLY THOUGHT  I  CAN'T BE  SWAYED ?
blocks.translation: ALORS QUE TU PENSAIS AU DÉPART QUE JE NE POUVAIS PAS ÊTRE INFLUENCÉ ?

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: DIDN'T YOU  SAY  YOU TRUST  ME ?
blocks.translation: N’AS-TU PAS DIT QUE TU ME FAISAIS CONFIANCE ?

blocks.text: THIS  PAINS ME  EVEN  AS  I  TRY  TO UNDERSTAND  YOU .
blocks.translation: ÇA ME FAIT MAL MÊME EN ESSAYANT DE TE COMPRENDRE.

blocks.text: I  KNEW  IT WOULD  NATURALLY BE  THIS  WAY .
blocks.translation: JE SAVAIS QUE CE SERAIT NATURELLEMENT AINSI.

blocks.text: I  WORRIED  YOU MIGHT  MISUNDERSTAND MY  INTENTIONS  SINCE I'M  SPEAKING  TO YOU  AT  A  TIME
blocks.translation: JE CRAIGNAIS QUE TU NE COMPRENNES MAL MES INTENTIONS, CAR JE TE PARLE AU MOMENT

blocks.text: WHEN  YOU'VE  JUST SEEN  MY  YOUNGER BROTHER .
blocks.translation: OÙ TU VIENS DE VOIR MON JEUNE FRÈRE.

blocks.text: IASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: IASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: WHAT MISUNDERSTANDING WOULD  I  HAVE ?
blocks.translation: QUEL MALENTENDU AURAIS-JE ?

blocks.text: I'M  SIMPLY GRATEFUL  FOR HOW  MUCH  YOU VALUE  ME .
blocks.translation: JE SUIS JUSTE RECONNAISSANTE DE L’ESTIME QUE TU ME PORTES.

blocks.text: THAT'S  ONLY NATURAL .  PLEASE  DON'T SAY  SUCH  THINGS .
blocks.translation: C’EST NATUREL. NE DIS PAS DE TELLES CHOSES.

blocks.text: THEN
blocks.translation: ALORS

blocks.text: I  SHALL TAKE  MY  LEAVE .
blocks.translation: JE VAIS M’EN ALLER.

blocks.text: IF  HE WERE  PERFECT LIKE  THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER ,  WHY  WOULD I  NEED  HIM ?
blocks.translation: S’IL ÉTAIT PARFAIT COMME LE DEUXIÈME JEUNE MAÎTRE, POURQUOI AURAIS-JE BESOIN DE LUI ?

blocks.text: RATHER  THAN  SOMEONE LIKE  THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER  WHO  IS  AS  CUNNING AS  A  SNAKE ,  IT'S  BETTER  TO HAVE  THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  WITH  HIS WEAKNESSES .
blocks.translation: PLUTÔT QUE QUELQU’UN COMME LE DEUXIÈME JEUNE MAÎTRE, ASTUCIEUX COMME UN SERPENT, JE PRÉFÈRE LE PREMIER JEUNE MAÎTRE AVEC SES FAIBLESSES.

blocks.text: I  JUST ...  NEED TO  WATCH  OVER  HIM CAREFULLY .
blocks.translation: JE DOIS JUSTE... LE SURVEILLER ATTENTIVEMENT.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: 작화 도움 박종일 석은 정
blocks.translation: 작화 도움 박종일 석은 정

blocks.text: JHS STUDIO
blocks.translation: JHS STUDIO
